chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 2710 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. -------- None present for the petitioner. No intimation received. It is now 11- 55 a.m. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 10.01.2018. Since none is present on behalf of the petitioner, therefore, we have ourselves gone through the impugned order dated 03.10.2016, passed by learned Special Judge Matiari, which has been challenged in this petition. We have gone through the impugned order as well as the grounds taken by the learned counsel for the petitioner in this petition and have come to the conclusion that the learned trial court while disposing of the summary under ‘B’ class has addressed all the points involved in the case. Even otherwise no substantial ground has been taken by the petitioner in this petition for our indulgence to come to a different conclusion. We under the aforementioned facts and circumstances dismissed this petition alongwith the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.
